name: Tuna Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Pierce the bottom and sides of the pie shell with a fork.
2. Preheat the oven to 450°F (232°C).
3. Bake the empty pie shell for 5 minutes.
4. Remove the pie from the oven and layer the tuna, cheese, peas, and onion in the shell.
5. In a separate bowl, beat together the eggs, evaporated milk, lemon juice, chopped chives, and seasonings (garlic salt, salt, and pepper) until well combined.
6. Reduce the oven temperature to 350°F (177°C).
7. Return the pie to the oven and bake for an additional 12 minutes or until golden brown.
